state:
44.5
gad-v1.1 active Planning graph shipped (42.2-45/47/48, decision gad-199). gad graph build produces 827-node graph.json + interactive HTML viz. gad query provides LLM-free structural queries (53x fewer tokens than snapshot). Next: 42.2-43 (wire graph into site command+K search), 42.2-44 (VCS graph panel in project editor). Phase 44.5 DNA Editor work continues: 44.5-12 (list population), 44.5-13 (action wiring). Still open for next session: 42.2-45 (native planning-graph extractor), 42.2-43 (site pipeline), 42.2-44 (VCS graph panel). Snapshot EQUIPPED SKILLS pinned refactor + Position B workflow retrofits still queued from earlier. **Decision gad-198 landed same session**: skills = genes in the DNA, `gad try` = epigenetic expression, proto-skills = mutations, promote = integration. Verb collapse: two verbs (express / integrate) against three states (expressed / mutation / integrated). The scattered install/try/proto/shed/promote commands are all one lifecycle. **DNA Editor** is the unified surface: a new pane inside the Project Editor (phase 44.5) consistent with Project Editor / Brood Editor / Bestiary naming. Shows all four gene states with state-appropriate actions wired through the 44.5-02 dev bridge to the CLI; artifacts with HTML output render in the 44.5-10 iframe. Phase 44.5 goal extended (no new phase number). New tasks 44.5-11 (scaffold via `scaffold-visual-context-surface` skill — first real application, fractal closure on 42.2-13 evolution pipeline proof), 44.5-12 (list population from `.claude/skills/` + `.gad-try/` + `.planning/proto-skills/` + shed data), 44.5-13 (action row wiring through dev bridge), 44.5-14 (iframe preview for trial artifacts), 44.5-15 (command+K shortcuts). Plus 42.2-46 (verb collapse docs in `references/skill-lifecycle.md` + deprecate install-skill global as default first-encounter path). Session at clean planning boundary — restart recommended for the implementation pass. Still open for next session: (a) third canonical discovery battery rerun, (b) snapshot EQUIPPED SKILLS pinned-skills refactor, (c) more Position B workflow retrofits (gad-plan-phase, gad-debug), (d) extend consumer-init-install Flow C to gemini/opencode/copilot/antigravity runtimes if desired, (e) phase 44.5 Project Editor work (can now use the new proto-skill as guidance). All committed work is durable. Parallel-work session nearing end as context fills. New: 42.2-34 (promote-folder scope fix — framework-only, `--project` flag removed), 42.2-35 (consumer init/install integration test + bin/install.js:4860 local-checkout bug fix — canonicalSkillsSrc now falls back from sdk/skills to repo-root skills/; 5/5 tests green, 139 SKILL.md files install correctly from a local clone). Commits 2326bc6, b22397d, 991f443. Shipped since last state update: 42.2-32 (gad skill promote-folder + VCS canonicalized to status: stable), 42.2-33 (gad:proto-skill-battery skill + workflow + evolution-evolve auto-hook). Commits: 6498414, 03497e0. Proto-skill battery is the parallel of the canonical discovery battery but scoped to proto-skills with a proto-vs-proto supersession arm (not proto-vs-canonical — that framing was wrong per operator clarification: canonical is framework-specific, consumer projects have their own ecosystems that grow and obsolete each other). Three scores per proto: findability (0-10), execution_sufficiency (0-10), shed_score (0.0-1.0 derived from proto-vs-proto ranking). Shed thresholds: 0.5 flags, 0.75 recommends eviction. Battery never mutates canonical state; operator decides. Auto-runs as evolution-evolve step 9. Open for next session: (a) third canonical battery rerun after 42.2-30 skill-find shipped to measure Agent C delta, (b) snapshot EQUIPPED SKILLS pinned-skills refactor (still-open P1), (c) more Position B workflow retrofits (gad-plan-phase, gad-debug), (d) first actual `gad evolution evolve` run to exercise the new 9-step pipeline end-to-end including the proto-skill battery hook, (e) unblock 42.2-13 via 42.2-06 (create-proto-skill implementation), (f) phase 44.5 Project Editor work. All committed work is durable. Session can end cleanly.
.planning/ROADMAP.xml (phases 42.1, 42.2, 42.3, 44.5) .planning/TASK-REGISTRY.xml (tasks 42.1-01..06, 42.2-01..06, 42.3-01..17, 42.4-01..07, 44.5-01..04+02b) .planning/DECISIONS.xml (gad-160 through gad-192) references/skill-shape.md scripts/validate-canonical-assets.mjs references/proto-skills.md skills/gad-evolution-evolve/SKILL.md skills/gad-evolution-validator/SKILL.md skills/gad-quick-skill/SKILL.md site/scripts/build-site-data.mjs (parseWorkflows) site/lib/catalog.generated.ts (WORKFLOWS export) .planning/workflows/README.md .planning/workflows/gad-loop.md .planning/workflows/gad-discuss-plan-execute.md .planning/workflows/gad-decide.md .planning/workflows/gad-debug.md .planning/workflows/gad-evolution.md .planning/workflows/gad-findings.md .planning/notes/upstream-gsd-review-2026-04-14.md tmp/get-shit-done/ (mirror pin 62b5278, 2026-04-14) bin/gad-config.cjs bin/gad-tools.cjs bin/gad-mcp.cjs bin/gad.cjs (workspace/worktree/self-eval commands) site/scripts/compute-self-eval.mjs bin/gad.cjs (evolution install/validate/promote/status) site/app/formulas/page.tsx sdk/src/init-runner.ts sdk/src/context-engine.ts workflows/gad-new-project.md workflows/settings.md references/framework-comparison-matrix.md .planning/notes/context-engine-hydration-questions-2026-04-14.md .planning/notes/retr-visual-context-landmarks-intro-2026-04-15.md (task 44-37)
2026-04-16T02:00:00.000Z
